untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle is a visual candlestick pattern requiring multi-bar shape recognition (cup formation with ≥30% rise from A to B, followed by handle formation). The allowed indicators cannot detect the geometric cup shape or validate the 30% rise threshold across identified pattern points. Pattern detection requires bar-by-bar shape analysis unavailable in the provided indicator set. Entry condition specified as 'breakout above cup lip' but cup lip price level cannot be calculated from allowed indicators without manual pattern identification.
translation_notes: Pattern is inherently untranslatable. Used generic pivot-based breakout as placeholder, but this does not capture the Cup with Handle logic. Success rate of 68% in bull regimes and average 11% rise noted in parameters. Manual pattern detection required.
